changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Expose the view registry to the frontend via a Tauri command.

## Key files
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — add `list_views` command
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/src/main.rs` — register in invoke_handler

## Implementation
```rust
#[tauri::command]
pub async fn list_views(
    state: State<'_, AppState>,
) -> Result<Value, String> {
    let handle = state.active_handle().await.ok_or("No active board")?;
    let views = handle.ctx.views()
        .ok_or("Views not loaded")?;
    let views_json: Vec<Value> = views.all_views()
        .iter()
        .map(|v| serde_json::to_value(v).unwrap())
        .collect();
    Ok(json!({ "views": views_json }))
}
```

## Checklist
- [ ] Add list_views command to commands.rs
- [ ] Register in main.rs invoke_handler
- [ ] cargo build -p swissarmyhammer-kanban-app compiles

+Expose the view registry to the frontend via Tauri commands, including CRUD and undo.

## Key files
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — add list_views query + execute_command arms
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban-app/src/main.rs` — register list_views in invoke_handler

## Commands
- `list_views` — query command, returns `{ views: [...] }`
- `execute_command("view.create", args)` — create a new view
- `execute_command("view.update", args)` — update view properties
- `execute_command("view.delete", args)` — delete a view
- `execute_command("view.undo", args)` — undo via snapshot replay
- `execute_command("view.redo", args)` — redo via snapshot replay

- [ ] Add view.create/update/delete/undo/redo arms to execute_command
- [ ] Register list_views in main.rs invoke_handler
- [ ] cargo build -p swissarmyhammer-kanban-app compiles
